title: Smooth
text: Smooth On older versions of Windows (prior to Microsoft Windows XP), this property determines whether the widget value is shown as a smooth progression, rather than in incremented steps. True or False (default). Description For example, if this property is set to True , a progress bar widget shows the display rectangle filling gradually instead of each value increment being represented by a color block. Note: This setting is supported only in the Classic Theme on Windows XP. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
